'''Yor Millto''' was a [[Toong/Legends|Toong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on the desert world of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Like many others on this [[Planet/Legends|planet]], he had a few [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] who had to work for him. When Space Pirate [[Krayn]] kidnapped his slave [[Hala]] and [[Amee/Legends|Amee]], he considered the loss to be annoying but not tragic. He was known to treat his slaves more as objects than as living things.

{{Char-stub}}
